# Mailbox

Entry map for the admin mailbox module, including inbox views, account setup, OAuth callback wiring, compose flows, and background sync.

## Use when

- Account CRUD, Gmail OAuth redirect/callback, IMAP connection test, or sync issues need investigation.
- Compose/send flow or SMTP/Gmail client behavior is involved.
- Inbox listing, thread view, star/trash, or attachment download behavior is changing.

## Start here

- [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php)
- [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php)
- [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox)
- [Modules/Mailbox/Routes/web.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Routes/web.php)

## Common edit bundles

- **Inbox UI bundle** — Inbox UI changes typically span controller, util, views, and the module JS/CSS assets. | [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/assets/css/mailbox.css](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/assets/css/mailbox.css), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/assets/js/mailbox.js](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/assets/js/mailbox.js), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/partials](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/partials), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxMessageUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxMessageUtil.php)
- **Account management bundle** — Account setup and OAuth wiring should be edited together to avoid auth flow drift. | [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxOAuthController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxOAuthController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/StoreMailboxAccountRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/StoreMailboxAccountRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/UpdateMailboxAccountRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/UpdateMailboxAccountRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/accounts](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/accounts), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxAccountUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxAccountUtil.php)

## Primary workflows

- **Inbox and thread view** — Inbox listing and thread read/star/trash behavior lives in controller + message util + inbox views. | [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/inbox), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/partials](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/partials), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxMessageUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxMessageUtil.php)
- **Account setup and OAuth** — Account CRUD + OAuth redirect/callback + connection test span controller, form requests, util, and account views. | [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxAccountController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxOAuthController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxOAuthController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/StoreMailboxAccountRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/StoreMailboxAccountRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/TestMailboxConnectionRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/TestMailboxConnectionRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/UpdateMailboxAccountRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/UpdateMailboxAccountRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/accounts](../../Modules/Mailbox/Resources/views/accounts), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxAccountUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxAccountUtil.php)
- **Compose and send** — Send flow: controller validates via FormRequest, delegates to send util, which uses SMTP or Gmail client. | [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxSendController.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Controllers/MailboxSendController.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/SendMailboxMessageRequest.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Http/Requests/SendMailboxMessageRequest.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Services/GmailMailboxClient.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Services/GmailMailboxClient.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Services/SmtpMailboxSender.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Services/SmtpMailboxSender.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxSendUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxSendUtil.php)
- **Background sync** — Sync job dispatches to sync util which uses IMAP or Gmail client per account type. | [Modules/Mailbox/Jobs/SyncMailboxAccountJob.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Jobs/SyncMailboxAccountJob.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Services/GmailMailboxClient.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Services/GmailMailboxClient.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Services/ImapMailboxClient.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Services/ImapMailboxClient.php), [Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxSyncUtil.php](../../Modules/Mailbox/Utils/MailboxSyncUtil.php)
